• 3D match-3 puzzle game built with Three.js
  • Custom art importer using image processing to generate game levels
  • Auto-play mode and hint system for accessibility
  • Responsive design with fluid background effects
  • Export and share functionality for completed artwork
    const CONFIG = { gridSize: 8, blockSize: 1, spacing: 1.1, swapSpeed: 10.0 };
    function findMatches() { /* returns matched blocks in rows/columns */ }

VOXEL CRASH is a 3D match-3 puzzle game featuring a unique art importer that converts images into playable levels. The game includes auto-play functionality, hint system, and responsive design with dynamic fluid backgrounds. Players can import custom artwork, match colored voxels, and export/share their completed creations.
